nasb.text: So throughout all their habitations I will stretch out My hand against them and make the land more desolate and waste than the wilderness toward Diblah; thus they will know that I am the Lord.” ’ ”

esv.text: And I will stretch out my hand against them and make the land desolate and waste, in all their dwelling places, from the wilderness to Riblah. Then they will know that I am the Lord.”

cnv.text: 我必伸手攻擊他們，使他們一切居住的地方，從曠野到第伯拉他，都變成非常荒涼，他們就知道我是耶和華。”

ccb.text: 我必伸手攻击他们，使他们居住的地方，从旷野到第伯拉他，变得极其荒凉。这样，他们便知道我是耶和华。”
